/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MyProjectTests.dir/tests/decoder_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProjectTests.dir/src/Decoder/decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProjectTests.dir/src/Messages/NewOrderCrossMsg.cpp.o -o MyProjectTests  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
